return X(C)end,function(Y,b)local X=a(b)local F=function()return l(Y,{},b,X)end return F end,function(Y,b)local X=a(b)local F=function(...)return l(Y,{...},b,X)end return F end,function(Y,b)local X=a(b)local F=function(F)return l(Y,{F},b,X)end return F end,function(Y,b)local X=a(b)local F=function(F,h,Q,B)return l(Y,{F;h;Q;B},b,X)end return F end,function(Y)local b,l=853808-853807,Y[522734-522733]while l do r[l],b=r[l]-(504870-504869),(868115+-868114)+b if r[l]==1005851-1005851 then r[l],A[l]=nil,nil end l=Y[b]end end,-173125-(-173125),function(Y)r[Y]=r[Y]-(-117694+117695)if r[Y]==-778490-(-778490)then r[Y],A[Y]=nil,nil end end,{},function(Y,b)local X=a(b)local F=function(F,h)return l(Y,{F;h},b,X)end return F end return(E(715939+9706798,{}))(X(C))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[b(471647-446953)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
